text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “NN” include information for each core and supplemental HRSN for which a 
beneficiary received navigation services. 

Navigation outcome variables the utility HRSN (i.e., NN_CORE_UTILITIES_RSLVD_SW, 
NN_CORE_UTILITIES CNCT_CSP_SW, NN_CORE_UTILITIES_OPTOUT_SW, 
NN_CORE_UTILITIES_CNTCT_FAIL_SW, NN_CORE_UTILITIES_CSP_UNAVBL_SW, and 
NN_CORE_UTILITIES_OUTCM_UNK_SW) are
